About Me

From chaos
to structure.

I'm a software engineer who gravitates toward the hard, messy problems — unstructured documents, multi-modal AI pipelines, and systems that need to work at production scale. I've shipped real products that handle real edge cases, and I think startups are where you learn the fastest.

LLM-Driven Document Extraction
Medical equipment service quotes — every vendor uses different column names. GPT-3.5 maps structure at ingestion time, per-field confidence scores surface low-quality extractions for analyst review. 30+ FastAPI routes across pipeline, QC, and analytics modules.

Zero-Entry AI Textile Catalog
Sellers upload a photo — Gemini Vision generates the entire listing. Custom prompt rules: SAREE IDENTIFICATION RULE (flat-lay detection), AUTHENTICITY RULE (never generic "printed" — always "Ajrakh", "Bandhani", "Hand Block-Printed"). 30+ categories, PIL watermarking, Docker + Render deployment.

03Personal Project · 2024

Kutch Fabrics
Smart Catalog

Built for artisan textile sellers in Kutch, Gujarat — people with hundreds of handcrafted SKUs and zero digital background. A seller uploads one photo; custom-engineered Gemini Vision rules generate the full product listing automatically. Three prompt rules drive the AI: a Saree Identification Rule (detects pallu structure, never confuses sarees with skirts), an Authenticity Rule (never writes "printed" — always "Hand Block-Printed", "Ajrakh Print", "Bandhani"), and a Color Separation Rule (color stored separately so catalog filters work correctly).
